title: Neighbor's right to make the raised part common.
doc_html:
Art. 683. Neighbor's right to make the raised part common.

           The neighbor who does not contribute to the raising of the common wall may at any time cause the raised part to become common by paying to its owner one-half of its current value.

           Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 683.  Neighbor's right to make the raised part common.
The neighbor who does not contribute to the raising of the common
wall may at any time cause the raised part to become common by paying to its
owner one-half of its current value.
Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
